message:
test: pin dlfcn.h conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_dlfcn.rs covering 5 functions:
- dlopen + dlsym + dlclose: open libm.so.6, resolve cos, close;
  asserts both null-status and exact resolved address match (shared
  library => same address)
- dlopen on nonexistent path: NULL on both
- dlsym(RTLD_DEFAULT, "getpid"): both resolve to a real address
- dlsym unknown symbol: NULL on both
- dladdr on libc::malloc: dli_fbase matches across impls

6 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc. dlclose with bogus
handle skipped (UB, glibc rtld segfaults).

Bead: bd-dlf1
